name: Hemlock
description:
Concentrated hemlock is a particularly deadly toxin that halts muscle action-including that of the victim's heart.

Activate A (manipulate)

Saving Throw

Onset 30 minutes

Maximum Duration 60 minutes

Stage 1 ] damage and Enfeebled 2 (10 minutes)

Stage 2 ] damage and Enfeebled 3 (10 minutes)

Stage 3 ] damage and Enfeebled 4 (10 minutes)
